description.en: As an action, you can open your awareness to detect good or/and evil. Until the end of your next turn, you know the location of any celestial, fiend, or undead within 60 feet of you that is not behind total cover.

As an action, you can touch a creature and restore a number of hit points to that creature, up to the maximum amount remaining in your pool. You can expend 5 hit points from your pool of healing to cure the target of one disease or neutralize one poison affecting it.
You adopt a particular style of fighting as your speciality.

When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, you can expend one spell slot of any your class to deal radiant damage to the target, in addition to the weapon's damage. The extra damage is 2d8 for a 1st-levei spell slot, plus 1d8 for each spelllevel higher than 1st, to a maximum of 5d8. The damage increases by 1d8 if the target is an undead or a fiend.

Whenever you or a friendly creature within {{range}} feet of you must make a saving throw, the creature gains a bonus to the saving throw equal to {{value}}. You must be conscious to grant this bonus.
You and friendly creatures within {{range}} feet of you can't be frightened while you are conscious.
Whenever you hit a creature with a melee weapon, the creature takes an extra 1d8 radiant damage.
You can use your action to end one spell on yourself ar on one willing creature that you touch.
